response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's background is primarily in web, mobile, and embedded software development with strong contributions to open-source projects and system tooling. While his experience with low-latency systems, hardware-adjacent development (e.g., robotic arms, real-time systems), and deep technical contributions to tooling (e.g., DLang, CI/CD) is notable, there is no demonstrated focus on SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis—core requirements for this role. His educational background (Bachelor's in Computer Science and Fine Arts) and lack of advanced degrees or specialized experience in hardware/architecture further reduce alignment with the principal-level technical depth required.
strengths: Extensive experience in low-latency systems and real-time data handling (e.g., micro-services infrastructure handling millions of requests/sec)
Proven ability to develop hardware-adjacent software (e.g., robotic arms, real-time systems)
Strong background in system tooling, CI/CD, and dev-ops infrastructure (e.g., GitLab administration, Kubernetes deployments)
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or deep-learning workload optimization
Lacks advanced degrees (PhD/Master's) or equivalent experience in relevant engineering/CS fields
Background is heavily skewed toward software development rather than hardware-software co-design or AI accelerator architecture
